def positive_test_imports_private_production_module():
    rule_id = "test_imports_private_production_module"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test file imports a private production module (._module) instead of going through the public API."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
